overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic convertible driving through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle travels from an elevated highway underpass through dense urban canyons with towering holographic billboards, eventually stopping at a traffic intersection before continuing. The footage features high-fidelity ray-traced lighting with vibrant neon colors reflecting off wet asphalt surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with concrete infrastructure

agents.ego_description: driving a futuristic gold convertible steadily through the covered highway underpass alongside moderate traffic

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass creating a covered tunnel effect overhead
thick structural columns lining the sides of the highway
metal safety barriers with yellow reflective strips

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through a covered highway underpass with concrete pillars and guardrails lining the multi-lane road. Artificial lighting illuminates the enclosed space as other vehicles share the roadway, with distant city structures visible at the tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon approach with emerging skyscrapers

events.description: exits covered highway underpass into open urban canyon with visible sky and towering buildings ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating slightly as the vehicle emerges from the underpass into a wider street with glass skyscrapers visible in the distance

entered.detail: towering futuristic buildings with reflective glass facades rising in the distance
tropical trees lining the street approach
large illuminated advertising screens on building faces

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a wider urban street with palm trees and glass skyscrapers visible ahead. The lighting shifts from artificial to mixed as natural ambient light becomes visible, and digital billboards begin appearing on building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with overhead pedestrian walkways

events.description: vehicle passes under a pedestrian overpass connecting two commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating through the multi-lane city street, passing under overhead walkways and alongside building facades with neon signage

entered.detail: enclosed walkway bridge spanning across the street connecting two buildings
tall buildings covered in glowing neon signs and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through an urban canyon with towering buildings on both sides covered in neon signage. The camera passes under a pedestrian overpass bridge as the environment becomes increasingly dense with commercial architecture and digital displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown plaza with floating holographic advertisements

events.description: entering a major commercial plaza dominated by massive circular floating digital billboards and intense neon lighting

agents.ego_description: cruising through the neon-lit downtown core surrounded by massive holographic advertisements and futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk near the large digital screens

entered.detail: massive circular holographic advertising displays floating above the street
building-sized LED displays showing animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide downtown plaza illuminated by intense neon lighting and massive circular floating billboards. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant purple, blue, and orange neon lights from the surrounding skyscrapers and holographic displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with traffic control and pedestrians

events.description: approaching intersection and slowing down for red traffic light ahead
vehicle comes to a complete stop at the red traffic light behind other vehicles

agents.ego_description: stopped at a red traffic light in the downtown intersection, waiting alongside other vehicles while pedestrians wait at the crosswalk corners

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk corner to cross the street

entered.detail: tall poles with traffic lights showing red signal
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a busy downtown intersection and comes to a stop at a red traffic light. Pedestrians gather at the crosswalk corners waiting to cross, while the surrounding buildings display massive digital advertisements. The car remains stationary waiting for the signal to change.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown intersection crossing into commercial district

events.description: traffic light changes to green and vehicle begins moving forward through the intersection
vehicle accelerates through the intersection and makes a slight turn into the next street

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the green light and navigating the turn into the next section of the neon-lit city, passing other vehicles

entered.detail: continuation of the urban road with new building facades and advertisements ahead

segments.scene_description: As the traffic light turns green, the vehicle accelerates through the intersection, making a slight turn into the next street. The camera continues through the neon-lit downtown area, leaving the intersection behind as new urban architecture comes into view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle travels from a confined highway underpass into the sprawling, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic downtown. It begins within a concrete underpass lined with pillars and guardrails, moving steadily toward a distant exit where the enclosed space gradually opens into a wider urban street featuring palm trees and glass skyscrapers. As the vehicle enters a dense urban canyon, the environment shifts into a corridor of towering buildings covered in neon signage, passing under a pedestrian overpass before expanding into a wide plaza dominated by massive floating holographic billboards and wet, reflective asphalt. The camera then slows as the car comes to a halt at a busy intersection filled with waiting pedestrians and vibrant digital advertisements, remaining stationary until the light changes. Finally, the vehicle accelerates through the intersection and makes a slight turn, gliding deeper into the neon-lit city as new architectural structures emerge ahead.
